automation.title: Automation
automation.description: Monitor folders and automatically transcribe, polish, translate, and export new media files while Sona is running.
automation.rules_description: Each rule binds to a project. Language, Polish Preset, and Export Prefix are configured independently within each rule.
automation.no_projects: Create a project first before adding automation rules.
automation.list_hint: Configure folder monitoring and define behavior for each automation stage.
automation.empty_hint: Add a rule to keep a folder watched and push new files through the batch pipeline automatically.
automation.required_fields: Complete the name, project, watch directory, and output directory before saving.
automation.form_description: Configure the rule name, target project, and the pipeline stages and export behavior below.
automation.output_directory_placeholder: Choose where exports should be written...
automation.inherited_defaults_description: These values come from the selected project and are applied at queue time.

settings.title: Settings
settings.enable_voice_typing_hint: Type text directly into any application using your voice
settings.voice_typing_shortcut_hint: Global shortcut to activate voice typing
settings.voice_typing_description: Configure dictation into other applications and see whether Voice Typing is ready to run.
settings.voice_typing_dependencies_description: Voice Typing depends on a shortcut, live transcription model, input device availability, and background warm-up state.
settings.voice_typing_status_summary_off: Voice Typing is currently turned off.
settings.voice_typing_status_summary_preparing: Voice Typing is getting ready in the background.
settings.voice_typing_status_summary_ready: Voice Typing is ready to dictate into other apps.
settings.voice_typing_status_summary_missing_shor: Voice Typing needs a shortcut before it can start.
settings.voice_typing_status_summary_missing_mode: Voice Typing needs a Live Record Model.
settings.voice_typing_status_summary_missing_vad: The selected Live Record Model also needs a VAD model.
settings.voice_typing_status_summary_failed: Voice Typing hit a runtime problem.
settings.voice_typing_status_detail_off: Enable Voice Typing to dictate into other apps with your configured shortcut.
settings.voice_typing_status_detail_preparing: Shortcut registration and warm-up will complete automatically when the required dependencies are available.
settings.voice_typing_status_detail_ready: Shortcut registration and background warm-up are complete.
settings.voice_typing_status_detail_missing_short: Set a global shortcut so Sona knows how to start and stop dictation.
settings.voice_typing_status_detail_missing_model: Voice Typing reuses the live transcription model, so you need to choose one in Model Hub first.
settings.voice_typing_status_detail_missing_vad: Install or select the required VAD model in Model Hub before using Voice Typing.
settings.voice_typing_status_detail_failed: Sona observed a Voice Typing error and is waiting for the next valid configuration or warm-up cycle.
settings.voice_typing_dependency_shortcut_ready: A global shortcut is configured for starting Voice Typing.
settings.voice_typing_dependency_shortcut_missing: Set a global shortcut before Voice Typing can start listening.
settings.voice_typing_dependency_model_ready: Voice Typing can reuse the selected live transcription model.
settings.voice_typing_dependency_model_missing: Choose a live transcription model in Model Hub before using Voice Typing.
settings.voice_typing_dependency_vad_not_required: The selected live model does not require a separate VAD model.
settings.voice_typing_dependency_vad_ready: The required VAD model is configured.
settings.voice_typing_dependency_vad_missing: The selected live model requires a VAD model in Model Hub.
settings.voice_typing_dependency_input_ready: Voice Typing uses the current Input Device setting. The default device is valid.
settings.voice_typing_dependency_runtime_ready: Shortcut registration and warm-up have completed.
settings.voice_typing_dependency_runtime_off: Background warm-up starts only when Voice Typing is enabled.
settings.voice_typing_dependency_runtime_preparin: Sona is waiting for registration and warm-up to settle.

diagnostics.title: Model & Environment Diagnostics
diagnostics.description: Review the local transcription path, packaged runtime dependencies, and the clearest next fix when something is off.
diagnostics.entry_description: Open a dedicated diagnostics page for the local transcription path, runtime readiness, and packaged environment checks.
diagnostics.entry_hint: Review the current local setup and jump straight to the clearest fix when something is off.
diagnostics.first_run_missing: The recommended offline setup is still incomplete.
diagnostics.live_record_card_description: Model, VAD, permission, and microphone selection for real-time capture.
diagnostics.batch_import_card_description: Offline model and bundled media decoding support for file processing.
diagnostics.voice_typing_card_description: Shortcut, live model reuse, and runtime warm-up for dictation.
diagnostics.models_section_description: Check that local transcription models and required dependencies are present.
diagnostics.input_section_description: Check permissions and the availability of input or capture devices.
diagnostics.runtime_section_description: Check background runtime readiness and packaged environment dependencies.
diagnostics.live_model_missing: No Live Record Model is selected yet.
diagnostics.offline_model_missing: No Batch Import Model is selected yet.
diagnostics.model_path_missing: The selected model path no longer exists on disk.
diagnostics.model_path_unverified: Sona could not verify the selected path from the current runtime. The current configuration is being kept as-is.
diagnostics.model_ready: The selected model is configured and reachable.
diagnostics.vad_unknown: Pick a Live Record Model first to evaluate whether a VAD model is required.
diagnostics.vad_not_required: The selected Live Record Model does not require a separate VAD model.
diagnostics.vad_missing: The selected Live Record Model still needs a VAD model.
diagnostics.vad_ready: The required VAD model is configured and reachable.
diagnostics.punctuation_not_required: The current recognition models do not require a separate punctuation model.
diagnostics.punctuation_ready: The required punctuation model is configured and reachable.
diagnostics.punctuation_warning: A selected recognition model expects a punctuation model, but none is available yet.
diagnostics.permission_denied: Microphone access is denied, so the first live recording path cannot start.
diagnostics.permission_unsupported: This environment does not expose browser microphone permission controls.
diagnostics.permission_prompt: Microphone access has not been granted yet.
diagnostics.microphone_unavailable: No microphone devices are currently available.
diagnostics.microphone_ready: The current input-device selection is still available.
diagnostics.microphone_missing_selection: The saved microphone selection is no longer available.
diagnostics.system_audio_ready: System audio capture devices are available.
diagnostics.system_audio_warning: Sona could not enumerate system audio capture devices right now.
diagnostics.voice_typing_off: Voice Typing is currently turned off.
diagnostics.ffmpeg_ready: The bundled FFmpeg sidecar is present.
diagnostics.ffmpeg_missing: The bundled FFmpeg sidecar could not be found. Batch imports and media decoding may fail until the app is reinstalled.
diagnostics.log_dir_ready: Runtime logs can be resolved for troubleshooting.
diagnostics.log_dir_missing: Sona could not resolve the runtime log directory.

settings.vocabulary_description: Manage custom vocabulary, hotwords, polish keyword sets, text polish context presets, and summary templates.
settings.context_description: Manage the context presets and default selection used by text polish.
settings.context_default_description: Choose which preset text polish uses by default outside project-specific overrides.
settings.context_default_hint: Projects can still override this with their own preset selection.
settings.context_builtin_description: These presets are provided by Sona and can be viewed here, but not edited.
settings.context_empty_builtin: No extra context. Sona will polish without adding a preset-specific note.
settings.context_custom_description: Create reusable name + context pairs and switch between them from text polish or project settings.
settings.summary_templates_default_description: Choose which summary template should be selected by default outside project-specific overrides.
settings.summary_templates_default_hint: Projects can still choose a different summary template in project settings.
settings.summary_templates_builtin_description: These templates are provided by Sona and can be viewed here, but not edited.
settings.summary_templates_custom_description: Create reusable summary template names and instructions for different workflows.
settings.text_replacement_description: Automatically replace specific words or phrases in transcription results.
settings.rules_hint: Use " => " to separate find and replace text. One rule per line.
settings.hotwords_description: Enhance recognition for specific terms. One per line. (Currently supported by Transducer and Qwen3 ASR models)
settings.hotwords_hint: Tip: You can add weight by appending " :weight" (e.g. "Term :2.0"). Default weight is 1.0.
settings.polish_keywords_description: Group reusable keyword guidance into global sets. Enabled sets are combined when text polish runs.
settings.polish_keywords_placeholder: e.g. Product names, terminology, preferred spellings
settings.polish_keywords_hint: Use this block for preferred terms or style guidance. Enabled sets are combined in order during polishing.
settings.speaker_segmentation_model_hint: Used to split offline recordings into anonymous speaker turns.
settings.speaker_embedding_model_hint: Used to match diarized speakers against your known speaker profiles.
settings.model_selection_desc: Choose the default models used for live recording and batch import.
settings.general_description: Manage basic application behaviors and appearance.
settings.model_settings_description: Manage local transcription models and processing behavior.
settings.local_path_description: Configure local transcription and ITN parameters.
settings.download_desc: Download pre-trained models to start transcribing. These models are optimized for real-time speech recognition.
settings.path_hint: Select the folder containing encoder.onnx, decoder.onnx, etc.
settings.itn_desc: Automatically convert Chinese numbers to digits (e.g. "一百二十三" → "123").
settings.itn_note: Note: Load external FST (Finite State Transducer) rule files to implement ITN.
settings.delete_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}?

descriptions.sensevoice: Developed by Alibaba FunASR. A fast, multi-lingual model supporting Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean, and Cantonese. Includes built-in punctuation and formatting.
descriptions.paraformer: Developed by Alibaba FunASR. A robust streaming model optimized for Chinese, Cantonese, and English mixed-language recognition.
descriptions.whisper_turbo: Developed by OpenAI. A streamlined version of Whisper designed for fast and accurate offline transcription.
descriptions.whisper_large: Developed by OpenAI. The most accurate version of Whisper, ideal for complex offline transcription tasks across many languages.
descriptions.whisper_medium_aishell: Based on OpenAI's Whisper medium, specifically fine-tuned on the AISHELL dataset for improved Chinese recognition.
descriptions.zipformer_xlarge: Developed by K2-FSA. A highly accurate and efficient streaming model specialized for Chinese recognition.
descriptions.funasr_nano: Developed by Alibaba FunASR. A large and highly accurate offline model, supporting multiple dialects and complex transcription tasks.
descriptions.qwen3_asr: Developed by Alibaba Qwen. An offline Qwen3-based ASR model for high-quality batch transcription.
descriptions.firered_asr: Developed by Xiaohongshu (FireRed Team). An advanced offline model delivering strong performance for Chinese and English mixed-language tasks.
descriptions.dolphin: Developed by Dataocean AI and Tsinghua University. A multilingual, multitask ASR model supporting 40 Eastern languages and 22 Chinese dialects.
descriptions.ct_punctuation: Adds accurate punctuation and capitalization to raw speech transcripts. Optimized with Int8 quantization.
descriptions.silero_vad: Developed by Silero. Highly accurate Voice Activity Detection (VAD) model to segment audio into speech and silence.
descriptions.speaker_segmentation: Pyannote-based offline speaker segmentation model for splitting a recording into anonymous speaker turns.
descriptions.speaker_embedding: 3D-Speaker embedding model for matching diarized speakers against your known speaker profile library.
descriptions.itn_zh: Inverse Text Normalization model for Chinese. Converts spoken numbers (e.g., '一二三') into digits ('123').

settings.vad_buffer_hint: Buffer duration (seconds) to capture before speech is detected. Helps avoid cutting off the start of sentences.
settings.max_concurrent_hint: Number of files to transcribe in parallel.
settings.model_not_installed: Please download the model first from Model Settings.
settings.itn_description: Convert spoken numbers and formats into standardized written forms.
settings.restore_defaults_confirm: Are you sure you want to restore all model settings to their defaults?
settings.hardware_warning_confirm:
{{reason}}

Do you want to download it anyway?
settings.microphone_description: Configure input devices for voice recording.
settings.microphone_boost_hint: Amplify microphone volume (1.0 to 5.0). Useful for quiet microphones.
settings.system_audio_description: Configure capture of the speaker loopback.
settings.system_audio_hint: Select the system audio device for capture.
settings.mute_during_recording_hint: Automatically mute the system speaker during recording. This stops the microphone from recording system sounds.
settings.about_desc: Sona is a powerful, offline transcript editor providing fast, accurate, and private speech-to-text capabilities.
settings.update_desc_default: A new version of Sona is available.
settings.update_not_available: You are using the latest version.
settings.about_open_logs_desc: Open the directory where application logs are stored.
settings.minimize_to_tray_hint: When enabled, closing the window will minimize the application to the system tray instead of quitting.
settings.subtitle_behavior_desc: Control how the live caption window behaves.
settings.subtitle_appearance_desc: Customize the look of your live captions.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Review global content and LLM usage without leaving Settings.
dashboard.empty_body: Saved transcripts and successful LLM calls will start appearing here automatically.
dashboard.partial_error: Some dashboard details could not be refreshed: {{message}}
dashboard.global_content_description: Saved content volume, where it lives, and how much transcript data already has speaker attribution.
dashboard.recent_item_trend_hint: Saved recordings and imports per day.
dashboard.deep_scan_loading: Speaker stats are still scanning saved transcripts.
dashboard.identified_vs_anonymous_hint: Duration split across speaker-tagged segments only.
dashboard.top_identified_speakers_hint: Ranked by speaker-attributed duration, with segment and item counts alongside.
dashboard.top_speakers_empty: No identified speakers yet. Anonymous coverage still appears above when available.
dashboard.llm_usage_description: All-time successful LLM calls tracked since this analytics file started, including connection tests.
dashboard.missing_usage_hint: {{count}} successful calls did not include token usage from the provider.
dashboard.recent_token_trend_hint: Prompt + completion tokens recorded each day.

llm.title: LLM Service
llm.description: Configure LLM providers and models used for polishing, translating, and summarizing transcripts.
llm.credentials_hint: Choose which provider credentials to edit. Runtime behavior is determined by the feature bindings below.
llm.setup_action_api_key: Add an API key for the current provider to finish setup.
llm.setup_action_polish_model: Assign a model to polish to finish setup.
llm.setup_action_translation_model: Assign a model to translation to finish setup.
llm.feature_models_hint: Assign models for polish, translation, and summary before using those features.
llm.feature_models_runtime_hint: Polish, translation, and summary run with the model and temperature configured here.
llm.enable_summary_hint: Show the summary panel in the transcript editor. Summary can always be edited manually; generation still requires an LLM.
llm.free_service_hint: This is a free service and does not require an API key.
llm.candidate_load_failed: Could not load model candidates. You can still type a model name manually.

first_run.title: Welcome to Sona
first_run.description: We'll set up offline transcription so your first live recording is ready fast.

banner.title: Finish setup to start transcribing
banner.body: Sona still needs its local model setup before live recording or file import will work.
banner.dismiss_confirm_message: If you hide this reminder, it will no longer appear on the home screen until setup is complete.

welcome.heading: Fastest path to your first live transcript
welcome.body: We'll download a recommended offline model pack, check microphone access, and leave advanced settings for later.
welcome.fast_body: Use Sona's default local model setup optimized for microphone live transcription.
welcome.private_body: Speech recognition runs locally, so you can try the app without sending audio anywhere.
welcome.ready_title: Get ready in about a minute
welcome.ready_body: After setup, we'll land you on Live Record so you can start immediately.

models.heading: Download the recommended offline model pack
models.body: This installs SenseVoice Int8 for live and batch transcription plus Silero VAD for speech detection.
models.error_detail: We couldn't finish downloading the recommended models. Please try again.

microphone.heading: Allow microphone access
microphone.body: Sona uses your microphone first. You can change this later in Settings for other inputs or system audio capture.
microphone.device_hint: Choose which microphone Sona should use when you start live recording.
microphone.loading_body: We're requesting permission and loading available devices.
microphone.permission_body: Allow microphone access to finish setup and make the first live recording path work.

tray.quit_warning_message:
You have active tasks running. Quitting now will terminate them.

Are you sure you want to quit?

translation.error_config_missing: Please configure LLM service in Settings before translating.

summary.title: Summary
summary.subtitle: Keep a summary beside the transcript without rewriting the original text.
summary.manual_only_hint: Configure an LLM service to generate summaries. You can still write and edit this summary manually.
summary.stale: This summary is outdated because the transcript changed. Regenerate it when you are ready.
summary.empty_state: No {{template}} summary yet. Generate one or write it manually when you need it.

polish.title: Polish Text
polish.error_config_missing: Please configure LLM service in Settings before polishing.
polish.no_keyword_sets: No keyword sets yet. Create them in Vocabulary to reuse polish keyword guidance.

recovery.title: Interrupted Batch Recovery
recovery.description: Review interrupted batch imports and automated runs from your last session, then resume or discard them with one clear action.

banner.title: Interrupted work is ready to recover
banner.body: {{count}} file is waiting in Recovery Center. Batch: {{batchCount}} · Automation: {{automationCount}}
banner.body_other: {{count}} files are waiting in Recovery Center. Batch: {{batchCount}} · Automation: {{automationCount}}

overview.batch_description: Interrupted files added from Batch Import.
overview.automation_description: Interrupted files created by folder automation rules.

section.batch_description: Each file will restart from the source media but can keep writing into the same saved history draft.
section.automation_description: Discarded automation files are marked as skipped so the current watch session will not immediately queue them again.

item.source_missing: The original source file is no longer available. Discard this recovery item before resuming the rest.
